# QA Plan: Sprint 29 — Operationalize Data-to-Fight Loop
**Date**: 2026-10-02
**Generated by**: /qa-plan
**Scope**: 13 stories across TL export foundation (Req 06), nightly corpus approve (Req 06 / ADR-006), Platform Editor Phase E (Req 21 / ADR-011), Combat Domains Phase 3 (Req 18 / ADR-009), Catalog→Sim bridge (Req 16), C2 core loop (Req 02), Datalink (TR-sensor-004)
**Engine**: Unity 6.3 LTS (C# / .NET 8 headless; PlayMode for Unity adapter)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-29-operationalize-data-fight-loop.md`
**Trunk**: `main` @ `1d93e86` (Sprint 28 complete; 801/801; ReplayGolden 6/6; QA APPROVED)
**Sprint Dates**: 2026-10-02 → 2026-10-15
**Review mode**: **Lean** — Buildkite = merge authority; GHA CodeQL advisory (permanent local-gate fallback)
**Producer constraints (inherited S28)**: Nightly corpus + approve workflow off-CI only; full 7208 `sensor.md` stays off-CI; TL export Phases 1–2 metadata only (no runtime `tlBranch` binding); ADR-011 Excel-primary write path

## Hard Gates (Non-Negotiable)

| Gate | Command / Check | Applies |
|------|-----------------|---------|
| **Full solution ≥801** | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal` | Every merge + closeout |
| **ReplayGolden 6/6** | `dotnet test …Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests… --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests"` | Every sim/delegation merge (S29-05, S29-06, S29-09, S29-11) |
| **DelegationBridge ZERO touch** | `git diff main -- src/ProjectAegis.Delegation/DelegationBridge.cs` → empty on Unity PRs | All Unity-track stories (S29-04, S29-07, S29-08) |
| **CatalogWriteGate extend-only** | `npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate` before every edit; WriteGate regression PASS | S29-02, S29-03, S29-04, S29-06, S29-10 |
| **No 7208 sensor in CI** | Curated fixtures only in `dotnet test`; nightly + approve off-CI | S29-02, S29-03 |
| **No TL runtime binding** | `rg -l "TlBranch\|BranchDatabase\|tlBranch" src/` → zero production binding | S29-02 |
| **Baltic combat isolation** | `combatDomainsEnabled=true` only on isolated pinned golden; production Baltic fixture policy documented | S29-05 |

## Automated Tests Required (by story)

### S29-01 — Full-solution re-baseline

**Path**: Evidence `production/qa/smoke-sprint-29-*.md`

- `dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln` — 0 errors
- `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` — ≥ **801** PASS
- `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests` — 6/6
- `npx gitnexus analyze . --force` @ day-1 HEAD
- Record `tests_passed_sprint29_baseline` in `sprint-status.yaml`

```bash
export PATH="/home/username01/.dotnet:$PATH"
cd /home/username01/cmano-clone/cmano-clone
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
npx gitnexus analyze . --force
```

---

### S29-02 — TL export Phase 1–2

**Path**: extend `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/` snapshot/export tests; migration `007` under `assets/data/catalog/migrations/`

- Migration `007` adds `catalog_snapshot.branch` (`TL-0`…`TL-5`); applies cleanly on fresh + upgrade paths
- Export manifests carry `tlTier` metadata on drops
- `rg -l "TlBranch|BranchDatabase|tlBranch" src/` → zero runtime binding
- WriteGate regression PASS (migration extend-only via `CatalogWriteGate`)
- Evidence: `production/agentic/sprint-29-tl-export-phase12-*.md`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Snapshot|WriteGate|Catalog|Migration" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "db_release|Snapshot|Catalog" -v minimal
# Runtime binding gate (must be zero)
rg -l "TlBranch|BranchDatabase|tlBranch" src/ || true
```

---

### S29-03 — Nightly corpus approve workflow

**Path**: extend `tools/cmo-nightly-import.sh`; extend `CmoMarkdownImportGoldenTests.cs`; curator approve CLI tests

- Nightly job → propose → `ApproveBatch` → `RecordRelease` + pinned `content_hash_sha256`
- WriteGate regression PASS (sensor + Phase A/B + damage + platform unchanged)
- ReplayGolden 6/6 unchanged
- Empty-diff re-import on curated platform v2 slice
- CI stays curated slices only; no full 7208 `sensor.md` in `dotnet test`
- **Sprint fails** if approve workflow does not land through write gate with snapshot evidence

```bash
# Job validation (off-CI)
./tools/cmo-nightly-import.sh --dry-run --entity platform --max-records 500 --approve
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CmoMarkdown|WriteGate|Platform|CatalogImport|Snapshot|Approve" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CatalogImport|Platform|Approve" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal
```

**Manual**: Review evidence `production/qa/sprint-29-nightly-corpus-approve-*.md` — confirm off-CI only; curator approve path documented.

---

### S29-04 — Platform Editor Phase E — Unity import UI

**Path**: extend `PlatformWorkbookWriteBridgeTests.cs`, `PlatformCatalogViewerTests.cs`; new import staging host tests in `ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests`

- In-engine import → propose → approve atop `PlatformWorkbookWriteBridge`; no `IWriteGate` bypass
- Headless import staging review UX wired; CLI authority preserved for batch approve
- Viewer/host write-gate bypass grep clean
- ZERO touch `DelegationBridge.cs`

```bash
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "WriteGate|Platform|Excel|Import" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlatformCatalog|PlatformWorkbook|Excel|PlayModeSmoke" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CatalogImport|Platform" -v minimal
# Grep gate (PR checklist)
rg -l "IWriteGate|CatalogWriteGate" src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter/Platform/ || true
```

**Manual (advisory)**: Evidence `production/qa/evidence/platform-import-ui-s29-*.png` — import staging review visible in Editor; defer to lean proxy if Editor unavailable.

## Smoke Test Scope

Run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA sign-off. Minimum automated scope:

1. **Full solution green** — `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` ≥801
2. **Replay golden** — 6/6 PASS
3. **Nightly corpus approve round-trip** — propose → approve → `RecordRelease` → read-back → empty-diff re-import (S29-03 **sprint gate**)
4. **WriteGate regression** — sensor + Phase A/B + damage + platform unchanged
5. **TL export Phases 1–2** — migration 007 applies; `tlTier` on export manifest; zero runtime `TlBranch` binding (S29-02)
6. **ADR-011 Phase E import UI** — headless import→propose→approve via write bridge (S29-04)
7. **ADR-009 Baltic enable** — isolated flag-on golden pinned; production Baltic flag-off; replay unchanged on default path (S29-05)
8. **Phase B catalog→sim** — mobility/signatures/EMCON consumed in bounded sim paths (S29-06)
9. **Platform viewer + import headless** — browse + import hook tests PASS; no write-gate bypass (S29-04)
10. **ZERO touch** — `DelegationBridge.cs` empty diff on Unity PRs
11. **GitNexus** — analyze @ closeout; impact archived for `CatalogWriteGate` edits
12. **No full corpus in CI** — confirm 7208 `sensor.md` absent from test fixtures

### Consolidated gate commands

```bash
export PATH="/home/username01/.dotnet:$PATH"
cd /home/username01/cmano-clone/cmano-clone

# Hard gate 1: full solution
dotnet build ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal
dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln -v minimal                    # ≥801

# Hard gate 2: replay golden
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "ReplayGoldenSuiteTests" -v minimal             # 6/6

# Data track
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CmoMarkdown|WriteGate|Platform|CatalogImport|Excel|Snapshot|Approve|Migration" -v minimal
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "CatalogImport|Platform|Snapshot|Approve" -v minimal

# Sim track
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests/ProjectAegis.Sim.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "Combat|Domain|Damage|Readiness|PhaseB|Catalog|Datalink|Contact" -v minimal

# Unity track
dotnet test src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests.csproj \
  --filter "PlayModeSmoke|PlatformCatalog|Doctrine|Excel|C2TopBar|CombatDomainsSmoke" -v minimal

# Hard gate 3: DelegationBridge ZERO touch
git diff main -- src/ProjectAegis.Delegation/DelegationBridge.cs

# Hard gate 4: CatalogWriteGate extend-only (before merge)
npx gitnexus impact CatalogWriteGate

# Hard gate 5: No TL runtime binding
rg -l "TlBranch|BranchDatabase|tlBranch" src/ || true
```

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Notes |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------|
| S29-04 | Is Unity import→propose→approve workflow usable? | 1 | Advisory if Editor available; headless round-trip mandatory |
| S29-07 | Does doctrine inheritance panel communicate overrides clearly? | 1 | Advisory; headless proxy satisfies merge |
| S29-08 | Does Begin Execution feel like a deliberate phase gate? | 1 | Advisory; harness tests mandatory |

If Editor unavailable: headless proxy satisfies merge (S26/S27/S28 pattern).

## Entry Criteria

Sprint 29 QA may begin when **all** of the following are true:

| # | Criterion | Evidence |
|---|-----------|----------|
| 1 | Sprint 28 complete with QA APPROVED | `production/qa/qa-signoff-sprint-28-2026-06-18.md` |
| 2 | Full solution baseline **801/801** on trunk | `tests_passed_sprint28_closeout: 801` in `sprint-status.yaml` |
| 3 | ReplayGolden **6/6** at S28 closeout | `replay_golden_sprint28_closeout: pass` |
| 4 | QA plan exists (this document) | `production/qa/qa-plan-sprint-29-2026-10-02.md` |
| 5 | Trunk indexed @ `1d93e86` or later | `indexed_commit` in sprint-status Sprint 29 section |
| 6 | Must-have stories S29-01..04 marked `ready-for-dev` or `in-progress` | `sprint29_stories` in `sprint-status.yaml` |
| 7 | Producer constraints acknowledged | Nightly off-CI; TL export-only Phases 1–2; no 7208 sensor in CI |

**Blockers**: Missing QA plan; trunk below 801/801; ReplayGolden regression; open S1/S2 bugs on data/write-gate path.

---

## Exit Criteria

Sprint 29 QA sign-off requires **all** of the following:

| # | Criterion | Gate |
|---|-----------|------|
| 1 | Must-have S29-01..04 complete with AC verified | Automated OR documented evidence per story |
| 2 | **S29-03 approve workflow** through `CatalogWriteGate` with pinned snapshot | **Sprint fails if missing** |
| 3 | Full solution ≥**801** at closeout | `dotnet test ProjectAegis.sln` |
| 4 | ReplayGolden **6/6** at closeout | `ReplayGoldenSuiteTests` |
| 5 | `DelegationBridge.cs` ZERO touch on all Unity merges | `git diff` empty |
| 6 | `CatalogWriteGate` extend-only — no bypass regressions | WriteGate test suite + GitNexus impact archived |
| 7 | `/smoke-check sprint` PASS | `production/qa/smoke-sprint-29-closeout-*.md` |
| 8 | QA sign-off report APPROVED or APPROVED WITH CONDITIONS | `/team-qa sprint` output |
| 9 | No S1 or S2 bugs in delivered features | Bug triage clean for sprint scope |
| 10 | Minimum shippable should-haves: **S29-05 + S29-13** | Per sprint cut line |
| 11 | Story files updated via `/story-done` | 13/13 or cut-line documented deferrals |
| 12 | GitNexus re-index @ stack tip | `production/qa/sprint-29-gitnexus-*.md` |

**Advisory (non-blocking)**: S29-07 Editor doctrine screenshot; S29-04 import UI screenshot; S29-08 Begin Execution screenshot — headless paths satisfy merge in lean mode.

## Risk / Fallback Matrix

| Risk | Mitigation | Fallback |
|------|------------|----------|
| S29-03 fails | WriteGate tests first; curated platform fixture only | **Sprint fails** |
| Corpus scope creep into CI | Nightly + approve off-CI; `--max-records` in CI | Revert CI fixture changes |
| `CatalogWriteGate` violation (migration 007 + import UI) | `gitnexus impact` before edit; D04 WriteGate regression | Revert extend-only breach |
| ADR-009 Baltic golden drift (S29-05 flag-on) | Separate pinned hash; smoke fixture isolated; `/replay-verify` | Defer S29-09; cut S29-11 |
| TL runtime binding creep | `rg TlBranch\|BranchDatabase` gate every data merge | Revert binding code; export-only |
| Data ↔ Unity overlap on import UI | Data API first; single owner per file; write-gate grep | Defer S29-08 before S29-04 |
| Should-have overload | Cut line: S29-09 → S29-08 → S29-07 → S29-11 | Minimum: S29-05 + S29-13 |

*Generated from sprint kickoff + Sprint 28 QA template. Run `/smoke-check sprint` after implementation.*
